description_long: This object is a classic hunting or sporting rifle with a long, slender barrel and a wooden stock. The stock is made of dark-stained wood, featuring a smooth, ergonomic shape for comfortable shoulder placement. The barrel and receiver are metallic, likely steel, with a dark matte finish that reduces glare. The trigger and trigger guard are visible, and the rifle appears to have a simple iron sight system. There is no visible magazine protruding from the bottom, suggesting an internal or tubular magazine. The overall design is traditional, with no modern tactical attachments or modifications.
description: A traditional rifle with a long metal barrel and a dark wooden stock, featuring a simple iron sight and classic design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight.
description_view_1: The left side of the rifle is visible, displaying the full length of the wooden stock, metal barrel, and trigger assembly.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the buttstock end, highlighting the width of the stock and the rear of the receiver.
description_view_3: The right side of the rifle is shown, similar to view 1, with the wooden stock, barrel, and trigger visible.
